zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Montgomery於1102年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可時，她的父親Arnulf de Montgomery36歲，母親Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery26歲。她於1145年與Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1176年9月1日享年74歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德懷可福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Montgomery于1102年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可时，她的父亲Arnulf de Montgomery36岁，母亲Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery26岁。她于1145年与Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1176年9月1日享年74岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德懷可福德。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Montgomery was born in 1102, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Arnulf de Montgomery, was 36 and her mother, Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery, was 26. She married Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII in 1145, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 September 1176, at the age of 74, and was buried in Wexford, County Wexford, Ireland.

fr.Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales (U: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Montgomery est née en 1102, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Arnulf de Montgomery, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII en 1145, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1176, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Wexford, County Wexford, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Montgomery 1102 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnulf de Montgomery 36 und ihre Mutter Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery 26. Sie hat 1145 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. September 1176 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Wexford, County Wexford, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Montgomery è nata il nel 1102 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Arnulf de Montgomery, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII nel 1145, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1176, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Montgomeryが1102年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Arnulf de Montgomeryは36歳，母Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomeryは26歳であった。1145年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでLord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1176年9月1日に74歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードウエクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Montgomery(이)가 1102년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnulf de Montgomery(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1145년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 9월 1일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 베스퍼드 베스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Montgomery nasceu em 1102, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Arnulf de Montgomery, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII em 1145, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1176, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Montgomery родилась в 1102 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Arnulf de Montgomery было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII в 1145 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 сентября 1176 г. в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности вексфорд, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Montgomery nació en 1102, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Arnulf de Montgomery, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lafracoth (O'Brien) de Montgomery, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII en 1145, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1176, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda.
